results.rendered_html:
āpūra a. Becoming full.
— raḥ
1 Flow, current, large flood, quantity; svedāpūro yuvati caritāṃ vyāpa gaṃḍasthalāni  Śi. 7. 74 ; harṣabharāpūrapīḍanotphullayā dṛśā  Ks. 23. 71. 
2 Filling, making full.
